summary: Iteration 65: Verified PATCH FAILED fix and new project auto-execute flow. All tests passed. The 'PATCH FAILED: no executable changes produced' error has been eliminated. New projects from Creative Brief now auto-execute without PlanCard, emit preview_partial events for real-time preview, and show success message with next steps.

issues: CORS warning for react-router-dom@6 UMD script from unpkg.com - non-blocking but logged in console

critical_code_review_comments: PATCH FAILED strings successfully removed from message-stream.js
Auto-execute flow for new projects working correctly
preview_partial events being emitted and processed for live preview updates
seed_data_creation: Created test projects: E2E_Test_1775596596, PATCH_Test2_40632, PATCH_Test_40563
context_for_next_testing_agent: PATCH FAILED fix verified. New project flow: Login -> New Project -> Fill Creative Brief (elevator_pitch + brand_name minimum) -> Click Start Building -> AI auto-builds with live preview -> Success message. The fix eliminates 3 hardcoded PATCH FAILED suppression paths in message-stream.js. Projects created during testing can be deleted if needed.

test_results.7_live_preview_updates: PASS - Preview tab shows skeleton loading during build, then displays generated content
test_results.8_success_message: PASS - Success message shows 'Done — I built the page in app/page.jsx and updated the preview.'
